name: kmp-cloudsync-web-sample
description: Web sample consuming CloudSync Engine UMD bundle

scripts.test: node -e "const mod = require('../../engine/build/outputs/js/engine.js'); const CSE = mod.io.cloudsync.engine.CloudSyncEngine; const engine = CSE.Companion.create('{}'); engine.start(); console.log('State:', engine.getState()); engine.stop(); console.log('JS bundle OK!');"
